title: codereview-pass1: Header style mismatch
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:1-14 uses IETF code block header not matching numbered spec files like 02-physical-link.md which uses simple markdown headings and comment. close_reason: Addressed: updated header to match spec style, expanded all required sections (TDMA, hash, agility, sync, conflict, stub). P1 resolved.
